goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'city centre north b and b'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '7 people' and '4 nights' starting from 'monday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 09:00' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should depart from 'ely' and should be on 'the same day as the hotel booking'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge

Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 4 nights starting from monday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 09:00 and should go to cambridge
The train should depart from ely and should be on the same day as the hotel booking
Make sure you get train ID
